title: Customers With Only High-Value Orders
description: Find customers who have placed at least two orders and all their orders have an amount greater than 100. Return the customer id.
sql_solution: SELECT customer_id FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 AND MIN(amount) > 100;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

result = (
    orders.groupBy("customer_id")
    .agg(
        count(lit(1)).alias("order_count"),
        min("amount").alias("min_amount")
    )
    .filter((col("order_count") >= 2) & (col("min_amount") > 100))
    .select("customer_id")
)
